meta.negative_prompt: realistic, photographic, 3D render, text, watermark, complex background, detailed shading, gradient background

alt_poses.uno: curled into a tight sleeping ball, tucked paws and tail wrapped around
alt_poses.duo: sitting upright with tail extended straight out behind
alt_poses.trio: stalking forward in a low crouch, body stretched in a line
alt_poses.corner: sitting upright with tail wrapped neatly around to one side
alt_poses.straight: mid-leap, body fully stretched out horizontally in the air
alt_poses.L: sitting tall with tail curling along the ground to one side
alt_poses.J: sitting tall with tail curling along the ground to the opposite side
alt_poses.Z: mid-pounce with body twisting in a zigzag
alt_poses.S: slinky walk with body curving in an S-shape
alt_poses.T: sitting proudly with both front paws stretched straight out in front
alt_poses.chonk: curled up asleep in a plump round ball, face tucked in
alt_poses.cross: big stretch with a yawn, all four limbs extended outward
alt_poses.chonker: hefty cat sitting upright with a round belly and tail wrapping around
alt_poses.chonkest: sleeping flat on its side, totally relaxed, legs dangling
